nasb.text: Then the Lord said, “Thus will the sons of Israel eat their bread unclean among the nations where I will banish them.”

esv.text: And the Lord said, “Thus shall the people of Israel eat their bread unclean, among the nations where I will drive them.”

cnv.text: 耶和華說：“以色列人在我趕他們去的列國中，也要這樣吃不潔淨的食物。”

ccb.text: 耶和华说：“我把以色列人驱逐到各国的时候，他们也要这样吃不洁净的食物。”
